hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ "$f" == *.dart ]] && cd /Users/hilabb/repos/pet-circle && flutter analyze --no-pub 2>/dev/null || true
f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [[ "$f" == *lib/l10n/app_he.arb ]] && cd /Users/hilabb/repos/pet-circle && flutter gen-l10n 2>/dev/null || true

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
